home.pageDescription: JaylyMC makes Minecraft animations on YouTube and Minecraft Add-Ons for Bedrock Edition. There are couple of articles about Minecraft and coding.
home.aboutParagraph1: Hi I'm Jayly, this is my personal website to post my stuff.
home.aboutParagraph2: I make Minecraft animations on YouTube and Minecraft Add-Ons for Bedrock Edition.
home.aboutParagraph3: There are couple of articles about Minecraft and coding.
home.aboutContact: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me on Discord (jaylymc).
home.scriptApiExamples.title: Script API Examples
home.scriptApiExamples.description:
Community Driven Script Examples for using Minecraft's Scripting API.
This makes people to easily start develop scripts for Minecraft.
home.scriptApiDocs.title: Script API Docs
home.scriptApiDocs.description: My own documentation for using the Minecraft scripting API. Includes versioned API references, custom code examples for methods and more technical guides.
home.jaylyBot.title: JaylyBot
home.jaylyBot.description:
This is my own Discord bot. It mainly debug your Minecraft scripts, for both Stable and Preview version of Minecraft.
> "Probably one of the few bots I have seen on Discord that I feel is truly worth the effort and time." - Visual1mpact
home.scriptInterpreter.title: Script Interpreter
home.scriptInterpreter.description:
Script Interpreter is a debugging tool for Minecraft Scripting, that allows user to run JavaScript code in Minecraft Bedrock for testing the API features.
> "Woah this really helps a lot! Like a LOT!" - BlueIcezen
home.structureConverter.title: Structure Converter
home.structureConverter.description: A tool to convert Minecraft structures from Java (.nbt) to Bedrock (.mcstructure).

hkTunnelsTolls.pageTitle: Hong Kong Tunnel Tolls - real time, any tunnels | JaylyDev
hkTunnelsTolls.pageDescription: "Hong Kong Tunnel Tolls" — A helpful tool for Hong Kong drivers! Check tunnel toll rates instantly. We provide real-time toll information for Hong Kong's three cross-harbour tunnels (Western Harbour Tunnel, Cross-Harbour Tunnel, Eastern Harbour Crossing), Tai Lam Tunnel, Tate's Cairn Tunnel, Aberdeen Tunnel, Shing Mun Tunnels, Lion Rock Tunnel and Eagle's Nest Tunnel. Simple to use with clear information, helping you plan your travel time and avoid unnecessary expenses.
hkTunnelsTolls.insiderPageTitle: Hong Kong Real-Time Tunnel Tolls (Beta) | JaylyDev
hkTunnelsTolls.insiderPageDescription: Provides real-time toll information for Hong Kong's three cross-harbour tunnels (Western Harbour Tunnel, Eastern Harbour Crossing, Cross-Harbour Tunnel) and Tai Lam Tunnel. Beta version app, may have errors or instability.
hkTunnelsTolls.note.0: For private cars and motorcycles (including motorized tricycles), transitional toll arrangements are in place between different time periods for cross-harbour tunnels and Tai Lam Tunnel to orderly bridge the toll gaps between periods and ensure road safety.
hkTunnelsTolls.note.1: Cross-harbour taxi passengers who do not board at a cross-harbour taxi stand must pay the outbound ($25) and return ($25) tunnel toll, totaling $50.
hkTunnelsTolls.note.2: Motorcycles heading to cross-harbour tunnels and Tai Lam Tunnel are charged 40% of the private car toll during all periods.
hkTunnelsTolls.note.3: Private cars and motorcycles heading to Tai Lam Tunnel are subject to time-varying tolls, with taxi toll at $28 and commercial vehicle toll at $43.
hkTunnelsTolls.note.4: "Light Goods Vehicle (LGV)" includes goods vehicles and special purpose vehicles not exceeding 5.5 tonnes.
hkTunnelsTolls.note.5: "Medium / Heavy Goods Vehicle (MGV / HGV)" includes goods vehicles and special purpose vehicles exceeding 5.5 tonnes (excluding articulated vehicles).
hkTunnelsTolls.weekendSchedule: Sunday and Public Holiday Toll Schedule
